_schema: sector_heatmap_history v1 — daily heat-map readings of sector cap-weighted moves ('sector score'). Two feed variants share this store: the Rotation Radar Bot's 'SECTOR HEAT MAP' (universe = all stocks, R3000 + S&P 500) and, from 2026-06-11, the Market Vitals Bot's 'S&P 500 HEAT MAP' (universe = S&P 500). One snapshot per post. 'date' = trading session covered; 'scan' = feed scan label (e.g. EOD). 'market' = whole-universe cap-weighted move (percent). 'sectors' = each sector's cap-weighted move (percent), ordered best→worst exactly as the feed lists them. 'universe' and 'source' record the variant (present from 2026-06-11). The per-stock heat-map tiles are an image only and are NOT transcribed here.
_rules: Only confirmed feed numbers. Append-only — never edit or delete a committed snapshot's values. Never invent or carry-forward. Copy every percentage exactly as shown (no rounding). Sector names are kept as the feed displays them (labels differ slightly between the two variants — keep verbatim). The ETF net-flow store lives in rotation_history.json and is preserved unchanged.
